OEM Baby Sleeping Bag Manufacturing — Your Brand, Our Factory

Full OEM service: your labels, your packaging, your design. GOTS & BSCI certified factory in China. Low MOQ, fast samples, transparent pricing.

Start Your OEM Project →
GOTS Certified BSCI Audited Private Label Custom Packaging MOQ from 100 pcs

What Our OEM Service Covers

✓
Custom Design & Pattern
Send a reference or sketch — our team develops patterns, grading, and tech packs.
✓
Fabric & TOG Selection
Organic cotton, bamboo, fleece in 0.5–3.5 TOG. Fabric swatch samples available.
✓
Private Label & Branding
Woven labels, hang tags, care labels, barcode stickers — all to your specs.
✓
Custom Packaging
Polybag, box, or gift bag. Retail-ready packaging available.
✓
Pre-Production Samples
Physical samples shipped to you before bulk production begins.
✓
AQL Inspection
Final quality inspection before shipment. Third-party inspection available.

OEM vs. Ready-Made — What's the Difference?

Our OEM Service Ready-Made / Wholesale
Your own brand labels ✓ Included ✗ Generic
Custom design / color ✓ Full control ✗ Fixed catalog
Fabric choice ✓ Select from range ✗ Set fabric
GOTS / organic certified ✓ Available ✗ Not guaranteed
MOQ From 100 pcs/style Often 1,000+ pcs

OEM Timeline

  • Day 1
    Send Inquiry
    Share your design reference, target TOG, fabric preference, quantity, and delivery target.
  • Day 1–2
    Receive Quotation
    Itemized FOB price, fabric options, MOQ, and sample fee (deducted from bulk order).
  • Day 3–25
    Sample Development
    Pre-production sample made and shipped to you for approval.
  • Day 26–80
    Bulk Production
    Production begins after sample sign-off. AQL inspection, then shipment.

Start Your OEM Baby Sleeping Bag Project

Tell us your design, quantity, and target price. We'll send back a quotation within 24 hours.
